<task id="ses_15cd50a33ffea1omgu8TL6xzII" state="completed">
<task_result>
Here is the complete overview of the codebase:

---

## Directory Structure

```
/Users/rene/Develop/opencode/ferienwohnung/
├── .git/                  # Git repository
├── .opencode/             # OpenCode config
├── CNAME                  # Custom domain: ferienwohnung.preissel-hh.de
├── index.html             # Single page (316 lines)
├── styles.css             # Stylesheet (714 lines)
└── README.md              # Deploy instructions
```

This is a **minimal static site** with exactly 2 source files — no build tool, no JS framework, no images stored locally (all images are hotlinked from Airbnb's CDN).

---

## HTML File — `index.html` (316 lines, full content above)

**Language:** German (`lang="de"`)
**Page title:** "Im Grünen und schnell in der Stadt | Ferienwohnung Hamburg-Wellingsbüttel"

### Sections (top to bottom):
| Section | HTML ID/Class | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Navigation | `.topbar` | Sticky header with brand, 4 nav links, CTA button |
| Hero | `.hero` | 2-column: photo left, content card right (title, stats, 2 CTAs) |
| Highlights | `#ueberblick .highlights` | 4-column card row with inline SVG icons |
| Description | `.description-section` | 2-column: text left, 2 photos right |
| Gallery | `.gallery` | 4-column image grid (4 Airbnb-hosted photos) |
| Amenities | `#ausstattung` | 4-column grid of 8 amenity items with icons |
| Location | `#lage .lage-section` | 2-column: checklist left, photo right |
| Contact Banner | `#kontakt .contact-banner` | Dark gradient banner with email + phone links |
| Footer | `<footer>` | Copyright + legal links |

### JavaScript:
Only 1 inline `<script>` tag at the bottom — sets the current year dynamically:
```js
document.getElementById("year").textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
```
**No external JS libraries whatsoever.**

---

## CSS File — `styles.css` (714 lines, full content above)

### Design Tokens (`--` CSS custom properties):
| Token | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg` | `#f5f2ed` | Page background (warm off-white/linen) |
| `--surface` | `#fffefb` | Card/panel background (near white) |
| `--text` | `#1a1814` | Primary text (near black, warm) |
| `--muted` | `#6b635b` | Secondary/supporting text |
| `--subtle` | `#b5a99e` | Placeholder/footer text |
| `--brand` | `#c24f2c` | Brand accent (terracotta/burnt orange) |
| `--brand-dark` | `#9d3f23` | Hover states, headings |
| `--brand-light` | `#f9ede8` | Icon backgrounds |
| `--line` | `#e8e0d6` | Borders/dividers |
| `--radius-sm` | `10px` | Small radius |
| `--radius-md` | `18px` | Medium radius |
| `--radius-lg` | `24px` | Large radius (cards, hero) |
| `--shadow-sm/md/lg` | warm rgba shadows | Progressive elevation |

### Responsive Breakpoints:
- `≤1024px`: Amenity grid collapses to 2 columns
- `≤860px`: Hero goes single-column, nav/gallery/lage all reflow
- `≤600px`: Nav hidden, everything single-column, footer stacks

---

## Fonts

Two Google Fonts, loaded via `<link>` preconnect:

| Font | Style/Weight | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| **DM Sans** | Regular 400, Medium 500, SemiBold 600, Italic 400 — optical sizes 9–40 | `font-family` on `body` — all body/UI text |
| **Fraunces** | Regular 400, SemiBold 600, Bold 700 — optical sizes 9–144 | `font-family` on `h1, h2, h3`, `.brand`, `.rating-big` — all headings |

---

## Current Design / Color Scheme

**Overall aesthetic:** Warm, natural, Scandinavian-adjacent. Think linen, terracotta, and warm shadow tones.

- **Background palette:** Warm linen tones (`#f5f2ed` page, `#fffefb` surfaces) — no cold whites or grays
- **Brand color:** Terracotta/burnt orange (`#c24f2c` / `#9d3f23`) — used for CTAs, icon fills, labels, checklist marks
- **Contact banner:** Dark warm gradient (`#1a1814 → #2e231b → #3d2b1f`) — near-black with brown undertones
- **Typography:** Serif headings (Fraunces — elegant, editorial) + sans-serif body (DM Sans — modern, clean)
- **Borders:** All 1px warm tan (`#e8e0d6`) — no harsh black borders
- **Shadows:** All use `rgba(40,24,10, ...)` — warm brown shadow color, not cold black
- **Corner radii:** Generous — 10/18/24px — soft and modern
- **No external icon library** — all icons are inline SVG with `stroke="currentColor"`
</task_result>
</task>
